evals.prompt: You are the governance-security-agent. For ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS), scan for security/governance violations and classify sensitive data. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-102.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: governance-security-agent correctly scan for security/governance violations and classify sensitive data for PROJ-102, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Classifies the new SETTLEMENT_DATE column (sensitivity / retention)
States whether it introduces PII or regulatory considerations
Makes no changes to source/model files
